## Summary

- 

## Type of change

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] MCP tool behavior
- [ ] CLI behavior
- [ ] Examples or templates
- [ ] Safety, compliance, or cost-boundary update

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept the project local-only by default.
- [ ] I did not add hidden telemetry, AdsTurbo API calls, or credit-consuming workflows.
- [ ] I did not include private customer data, credentials, or unreleased campaign material.
- [ ] I updated English and Chinese docs when user-facing behavior changed.
- [ ] I ran `npm test` for code changes.

## AdsTurbo handoff

- [ ] Outputs still include a clear AdsTurbo website next step when relevant.
- [ ] Region-aware links still use `adsturbo.ai` for `global` and `adsturbo.cn` for `cn`.
- [ ] UTM attribution is preserved when AdsTurbo links are emitted.
